audit_notes: Sprint 9: PoolHistoryPoint and TokenHistoryPoint added. PoolDayData retained for backward compatibility.
fee_gas_ratio returns RATIO('0') not inf when gas_cost is zero -- callers must handle
All financial params use float instead of Decimal
Hardcoded defaults should come from config/default.yaml

Sprint 18: Float functions retained for reporter. New Decimal scorer metric functions added: rolling_window, annualized_vol_30d, fee_apr_from_records, volume_tvl_ratio_from_records, net_lp_alpha_from_records, compute_entry_metrics. Duplicate max_drawdown alias retained but flagged.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Weights from config/default.yaml scoring section. PoolScorer class with normalize/score methods. compute_pool_score pure function. hard_gate_alpha for negative alpha filter. classify_risk_tier for anchor/satellite/speculative. rank_pools sorted descending.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Thresholds from config/default.yaml signals section. Four signal functions (drawdown, momentum_crash, tvl_collapse, il_fee_ratio). Wrapper classes for each. any_exit_signal aggregates all.

Sprint 17: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Thresholds from config/default.yaml regime section. RegimeClassifier class. classify_regime returns four regimes. optimal_range_width and allocation_adjustment helpers. regime_summary full analysis dict.
PositionSimulator.step() implemented -- accepts PoolDayData
fee attribution is proportional model -- does not use feeGrowthGlobal yet
price range width is entry_price x multiplier -- not config-driven yet
HOTFIX: summary() IL price bug fixed -- last_price field added to Position
Includes regression test for summary() IL price bug (test_summary_il_uses_last_price_not_value_ratio)
Sprint 1: All financial params use float instead of Decimal. Hardcoded defaults should come from config/default.yaml backtest section.

Sprint 19: Migrated to Decimal throughout. Defaults wired to BacktestConfig values. Latent BacktestSimulator import bug fixed (was PositionSimulator). summary() uses Decimal quantize. equity_df() converts to float at display boundary only.
All methods raise NotImplementedError -- live execution not implemented in v2 yet
Sprint 9: Generalized abstract base to support hourly history fetchers. Docstrings updated.
api_key read from THEGRAPH_API_KEY env var -- silently uses empty string if not set, which will produce 401 on authenticated endpoints
Sprint 8: FetchError logs response body; URL supports {api_key} path substitution.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily records expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
TVL always Decimal('0') -- source limitation
fee_growth_global always None -- source limitation
price_token1_in_token0 is USD proxy for token1 not true intra-pool ratio
Requires COIN_ID_MAP update when new tokens added to registry
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily records expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Daily TVL snapshots expanded to 24 hourly PoolHistoryPoint records.
Sprint 9: save_pool_history accepts both PoolDayData (date field) and PoolHistoryPoint (timestamp field). JSON output includes timestamp for hourly records.
Hotfix 3: PoolHistoryPoint serialized to flat hourly array.
Sprint 10: pool_address hoisted to wrapper root; stripped from per-row records; load path injects it back.
Sprint 22: Atomic write block consolidated -- mkdir(parents=True) + os.replace() now unified for both hourly and daily branches.
Sprint 9: Persists token history to data/token_history/*.json.
Sprint 10: Save/load TokenHistoryPoint to data/prices/{SYMBOL}.json with wrapper schema.
CoinGecko token USD history fetcher. Normalizes to TokenHistoryPoint for trend and exit logic.
Sprint 9-hotfix2: Replaced market_chart_range (Pro-only) with free-tier market_chart?days=N&interval=hourly.
Hotfix 1: 90d chunk pagination via market_chart/range; uppercase COIN_ID_MAP aliases added.
Sprint 14: PoolConfig gains tick_lower/tick_upper sentinel defaults (-887272/887272).
Sprint 14: Tick fields loaded from JSON; validate() checks ordering and bounds.
Sprint 9: Dual-compatible validators. Hourly gap detection (flags gaps > 7200s). Daily behavior preserved.
CoinGecko API key is empty string by default -- must be set via COINGECKO_API_KEY env var
SPRINT 33-PRE: REPLACES ALL PLAYWRIGHT/JS SCRAPING WITH SUGAR SDK.
Uses velodrome-finance/sugar-sdk — Aerodrome official Python library.
chain.get_pools() returns all pools in one paginated RPC batch from on-chain Sugar contract.
type==-1 identifies CL (Slipstream) pools. gauge.alive==False identifies migrating pools.
Outputs memory/pool_reference_raw.json with schema_version=1.
268 active CL pools, 26951 migrating, 6555 basic excluded.
Deleted: scripts/aero_extract.js (already absent: scrape_aerodrome_playwright.py, scrape_aerodrome_all.py)
SPRINT 33: Reads memory/pool_reference.json, applies selection criteria, writes registry/registry.json.
Criteria: TVL >= $100k, fee tiers 0.05%/0.3%/1% (bps=5/30/100), 24h vol >= $10k.
Supports --dry-run, --min-tvl, --min-vol CLI flags.
Atomic write via tempfile + os.replace. Post-write validation before exit.
32 pools written on initial run (2026-06-10).
TOKEN_DECIMALS lookup table covers known tokens; defaults to 18 for unknowns.
tick_lower/tick_upper default full-range [-887272, 887272] for all entries.
SPRINT 33: Populates registry/registry.json from memory/pool_reference.json.
No TVL/volume filter — all 268 active CL pools included.
Merge logic: existing registry entries preserved verbatim by pool_address (lowercase).
Atomic write via tempfile + os.replace. Post-write validation before exit.
Supports --dry-run CLI flag.
TOKEN_DECIMALS lookup table; unknown tokens default to 18.
tick_lower/tick_upper: full-range [-887272, 887272] for all new entries.
268 pools written (32 existing merged, 236 new added).
SPRINT 33-PRE: Replaced all Playwright/JS scraping with Sugar SDK.
Uses velodrome-finance/sugar-sdk — Aerodrome official Python library.
chain.get_pools() returns all pools in one paginated RPC batch.
type==-1 identifies CL pools. gauge.alive==False identifies migrating pools.
Outputs memory/pool_reference_raw.json with schema_version=1.
268 active CL pools, 26951 migrating, 6555 basic excluded.
Sprint 34: Multicall3 slot0 price feed for all 268 registry pools.
Single RPC call via aggregate3. Decodes sqrtPriceX96 + tick.
Computes price_token0_in_usd using CoinGecko USD ref prices.
Outputs data/prices/prices_latest.json with atomic write.
All math uses Decimal. urllib only, no web3 dependency.
Sprint 34: Diagnostic check for slot0 Multicall3 calls.
Tests top 3 pools by TVL. Prints decoded sqrtPriceX96, tick, raw price ratio.
Sprint 34: Directory placeholder. data/prices/*.json is gitignored.
Sprint 34: Analysis-layer price loader. Loads {SYMBOL}.json into pandas DataFrames.
Functions: load_token(), load_all(), get_daily()
Separate concern from token_price_loader.py (domain model layer).
Sprint 34: Added price_loader exports (load_token, load_all, get_daily).
